name: quota
description: /quota <args> — Claude account 5h/7d usage limits + multi-account registry + live credential swap. Verbs: status (default · current account + live 5h/7d) · list (registered accounts) · add (snapshot account + capture credentials) · switch <ref> (live cred swap, verified + rollback) · remove <ref> · refresh [<ref>] (re-fetch usage into per-account cache; renews expired tokens) · help. 45s per-account cache (429 throttle). Per-account OAuth blob backup in macOS keychain svc 'sidecar-quota' / linux ~/.sidecar/quota/creds/<email>.json (0600). own-accounts-serial only (ToS — never multi-tenant). ⚠ depends on Anthropic's non-public oauth/usage + oauth/token endpoints (ccmon idiom) — may break if rotated.
